{{Infobox character
| name = Mercy
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Lowgold, Highgold, Truegold
| abilities = black madra, Blood Shadow, vast black web, shadow limbs, Puppeteer's Iron body
| affiliations = Akura clan
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Mercy Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Mercy]] is the daughter of the [[Monarch]], [[Malice]], and a member of her clan. Though she has faced exile from her family, she serves as a representative for them, often acting as a listener and source of reassurance for others. She is a [[Skysworn]] and a [[Reaper]] who possesses significant power, including the ability to wield the [[Eclipse]] (the [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker]]) and the Book of Eternal Night. Mercy utilizes a staff made of twisted black madra named [[Suu]], which can transform into a bow. She is also known to carry an extensive collection of medicinal herbs, elixirs, and pills. Mercy is characterized by her kindness and desire to do better than the petty or undignified behavior she observes in others. Unlike her mother, whom she describes as cruel, Mercy strives to be compassionate and seeks to establish an identity of her own. She has demonstrated leadership by issuing commands to soldiers and managing resources, such as providing living metals to help people live lives of plenty. Throughout her journey, she has faced various trials, including mental assaults from nightmare beasts and moments of profound helplessness, yet she remains determined to bring light and help those around her.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A member of the [[Akura clan]], Mercy participated in a course by straddling a dragon-headed staff. During the encounter with bloodspawn, she used her black madra to coat her palms and weapon, deploying a vast black web to intercept the creatures on the stairs. While she successfully held the bloodspawn back for a short time, she expressed fear as she pushed [[Lindon]] deeper into the structure. Concerned for [[Yerin]], Mercy watched as the two sat motionless and stared into space, later remaining present during a conversation between [[Lindon]] and [[Eithan]]. It is noted that her mother possesses a high level of power.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] participates in the course by straddling a staff with a [[dragon]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] is a member of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]]'s palms and staff are coated in black goo that is her [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|He turned with horror, part of him expecting to see [[Bai Rou]], but it was [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] uses black madra.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] has a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] uses a staff.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] stood below the door holding a staff in both hands to protect them.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] uses a vast black web to intercept bloodspawn.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] wields a dragon-headed staff.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] is a girl whose actions kept the bloodspawn out for a short time.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] uses webs to hold back the bloodspawn on the stairs.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] is a character who was worried about [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] is pushing [[Lindon]] deeper into a structure and expresses fear.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] is present during the conversation between [[Lindon]] and [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy's mother]] is at a high level of power.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy]] was watching [[Yerin]] and [[Lindon]] sit motionless and stare into space.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|An [[Akura girl]] and [[Lowgold]] power user, Mercy carries a bow that can transform into a staff shaped like flexible black tendons with a violet-eyed [[dragon]] head. While positioned on the beach behind [[Yerin]], she utilizes dark [[madra]] from her oil-gloved hand and employs shadow limbs to lift [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]]. Despite being the daughter of a [[Monarch]] who fought the [[Dreadgod]], she finds herself struggling on the ground with scorched hair and burned skin. During this ordeal, her arm becomes encased in violet crystalline armor as she cradles her weapon, [[Suu]]. To aid her recovery, Mercy maintains a supply of sacred herbs, elixirs, and pills, following an advancement that has been written out for her.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] uses a staff of smooth black with a [[dragon]] head that has violet eyes.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] was on the beach behind [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] is an [[Akura girl]] who uses dark [[madra]] from her oil-gloved hand.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] is a [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy's mother]] was a [[Monarch]] who fought with the [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy's staff]] has violet eyes that flare.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] is an [[Akura girl]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] has purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy's staff]] is shaped like a bundle of flexible black tendons with a violet-eyed [[dragon]]'s head on its end.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] is struggling on the ground.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]]'s arm becomes covered in violet crystalline armor.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]]'s hair is mostly scorched off.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] is cradling [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]]'s skin is red and burned.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] carries many pills, elixirs, and sacred herbs.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] has a bow that can take the form of a staff.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] has a weapon named [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] has her advancement written out for her.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] is addressed by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] is a [[Lowgold]] power user who used shadow limbs to lift [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|As a [[Skysworn]] traveling with [[Lindon]], Mercy pilots the cloudship by straddling her staff and utilizes a [[dragon]]-headed bow to defend [[Yerin]]. An exile from the [[Akura]] family and grand-niece of [[Charity]], she possesses the [[Puppeteer's Iron body]] but previously had her coordination and [[sacred arts]] sealed as a price for leaving home. Though she initially refuses a [[Heaven's Drop]] to avoid returning to her family, Mercy eventually regains her mastery of [[Nightworm Venom]] and the [[Shadow]]'s Edge through [[Akura Malice]]. After inheriting the weapon [[Suu]] from her [[Monarch]] mother, she utilizes a massive book of [[Forged madra]] containing her [[Path]] to achieve a stable advancement to the rank of [[Underlady]]. Following this progression, she is set to lead a team in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament but remains forbidden from returning to the [[Blackflame Empire]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] pilots the [[Skysworn cloudship]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] flies by straddling her staff.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] uses a [[dragon]]-headed bow.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is a character in the story.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is part of the group traveling with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] attempted to speak up during the conversation.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is wearing green [[Skysworn]] plate armor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] speaks in a soothing voice.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] uses a bow with a black arrow.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] used an arrow to defend [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]'s coordination was sealed as a price for leaving home.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] possesses the [[Puppeteer's Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is related to [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is present and excited by [[Eithan]]'s presentation.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] looked at [[Eithan]] askance.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] refuses to take a [[Heaven's Drop]] because she does not want to admit her faults and return to her family.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] was no longer present when [[Lindon]] looked up.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] leads [[Lindon]] to unclaimed natural treasure deposits.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] broke through to [[Highgold]] two weeks prior due to the surrounding [[shadow aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] can emanate the power of a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]'s power can drop from [[Truegold]] to [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] inherited the weapon [[Suu]] from her [[Monarch]] mother.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]'s hair has grown long enough to cover her ears.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] uses a [[void key]] to store items.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] was unhurt following the battle.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is an exile from the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is the grand-niece of [[Akura Charity]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] wears a smooth purple breastplate over black-and-white [[sacred artist]]'s robes.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]'s sense for [[Forging]] is good, but her [[shadow madra]] is not widely compatible.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] has a [[Goldsign]] on her fingers.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is a [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] stood with [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] wearing [[Skysworn armor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] was to serve as the native guide on the expedition.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] wears black gloves.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is the daughter of [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]'s [[sacred arts]] were previously sealed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] possesses the [[Divine Treasure]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]'s [[Divine Treasure]] is a massive book of [[Forged madra]] containing the power of her [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] has a soul oath with [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]'s mastery of the [[Shadow’s Edge]] was returned to her by [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]'s [[Nightworm Venom]] was returned to her by [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]'s spirit is at the peak of [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is expected to advance to the [[Underlady]] rank.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is forbidden from returning to the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] will lead a team in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is the niece of [[Aunt Charity]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] was fighting the second prince.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] felt [[Lindon]] advancing to [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] has advanced to [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]'s advancement to [[Underlady]] is stable.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] was always a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] left home because she did not want to be a [[Lady]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] uses a [[veil]] from her mother.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] rolls [[Suu]] between her hands.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] pointed to a silver-and-purple owl on the ceiling.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is gone.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The daughter of the [[Monarch]] and sister to [[Akura Pride]], Mercy is a [[Copper]] who completed her training program with a perfect score in only three days. As a preferred candidate for the [[Uncrowned]], she wields the [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker]] known as [[Eclipse]], the Book of Eternal Night, and a staff of twisted black madra called [[Suu]]. During the tournament on the sixth [[island]], she utilized [[Striker techniques]], [[bloodline armor]], and a [[Dream of Darkness]] technique to secure eighth place. Her combat repertoire also includes using shadow-venom, [[Strings of Shadow]] to bind foes, and conjuring arrows for defense. Throughout these events, she remained an entity that accompanied [[Lindon]], even appearing in his mind and visiting him to offer cheer.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] is the daughter of the [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] possesses [[Eclipse]], the [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] possesses the Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] is the sister of [[Pride]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] is a preferred candidate for the [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] is a [[Copper]] who earned a perfect score on the training program within three days.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] achieved her [[Copper]] advancement a few hours before [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Pride]] is [[Mercy's brother]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] is located on the sixth [[island]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] uses a staff of twisted black madra called [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s room is connected to [[Mercy]]'s room.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A wisp of [[Mercy]]'s hair was blowing in the wind.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] uses [[Striker techniques]] to destroy or seal enemy [[sacred artists]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] uses [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] has a [[Dream of Darkness]] technique and [[bloodline armor]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] is ranked eighth in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]]'s voice can echo in [[Lindon]]'s mind.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] is an entity that accompanies [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] was tending to [[Naru Saeya]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] watched the fight with excitement in her eyes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] can conjure an arrow for defense.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] uses [[Strings of Shadow]] to bind enemies.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] uses shadow-venom.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] hid in [[Yerin]]'s tree.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] is a competitor [[Lindon]] can see everything she has to offer.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] wears an [[Akura uniform]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]] was coming in to cheer [[Lindon]] up.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|While staying in a room connected to [[Lindon]] and [[Pride]], Mercy wore black-and-white robes and shared whispered concerns with [[Yerin]]. As a tournament competitor aiming to defeat Sophara, she watched the [[Uncrowned]] matches with her companions and later gathered with [[Eithan]] and [[Yerin]] at the cloudship dock. During the tournament, Mercy was transported to the stadium tunnels by [[Aunt Charity]], where she utilized her [[Overlord-level madra]] and various techniques—including the [[Dark Tide Incantation]], [[Nightworm Venom]], [[Shadow’s Edge]], [[Strings of Shadow]], [[soulfire]], [[bloodline armor]], and the [[Moon’s Eye]]—to achieve a temporary advancement to [[Overlady]]. After fighting three matches, she cheered for [[Yerin]] and rode [[Suu]] while carrying healing supplies, eventually finding herself in a dangerous situation. Mercy later fought Sophara and was the target of an assassination attempt by her, though she remained a member of [[Lindon]]'s team and possessed the influence to ensure her demands within the [[Akura clan]] were met.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]]'s room connects to [[Lindon]]'s and [[Pride]]'s rooms.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] wears black-and-white robes instead of [[Akura]] faction costumes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] was concerned and whispering with [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is a competitor in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]]'s goal is to defeat Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is watching the [[Uncrowned]] matches with [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]]'s signature would look the same as [[Eithan]]'s due to [[Akura Malice]]'s [[shadow madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] floated behind [[Mercy]] during the [[Uncrowned ceremony]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] gathered with [[Yerin]] and [[Eithan]] at the end of the cloudship dock.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is a character who left the scene.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|One of [[Mercy]]'s tricks helped [[Lindon]] figure out his [[Underlord revelation]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] trained on the [[Phantom Islands]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] has a brother.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] cannot afford distractions until she reaches the peak of [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] intends to relay [[Lindon]]'s greetings to [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] was transported to the tunnels beneath the stadium by [[Aunt Charity]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] uses the [[Dark Tide Incantation]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is an [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] possesses [[Overlord-level madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] uses the [[Nightworm Venom]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] uses the [[Shadow’s Edge]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] uses the [[Strings of Shadow]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] uses [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] uses [[bloodline armor]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] has a temporary advancement to [[Overlady]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] uses the [[Moon’s Eye]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] fought three fights.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] and [[Fury]] are being considerate of [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is present during the post-battle conversation.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] believed [[Lindon]] could win.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is present in the waiting room and cheers for [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] felt nervous because [[Aunt Charity]] could not transport them to [[Sky's Edge]] on her own.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] reacted to a projection of [[Lindon]]'s face.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] used a bow to fire a volley of violet arrows.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] rides [[Suu]] and carries healing salve or pills.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is in a dangerous situation.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is someone [[Malice]] would sacrifice for her family.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is a character who can relay requests to [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is present with [[Lindon]] and [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] was at [[Lindon]]'s bedside when he woke up.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] agreed that [[Lindon]] did the right thing.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] fought Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara had previously used [[Azure Moon Reigns]] against [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is a character mentioned in relation to [[Malice]]'s plans.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] and [[Pride]] were arguing near the evacuation portal.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] is part of [[Lindon]]'s team.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] can feel [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] was fully armored and released a volley of violet arrows from her [[Archlord bow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]]'s eyes were wild and panicked, filled with grief.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara attempted to assassinate [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|When [[Mercy]] demanded something in the [[Akura clan]], it got done.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|While caring for her brother, the [[Akura]] family's [[Overlord]] Mercy requested privacy before appearing alongside [[Charity]] and [[Lindon]]. As the daughter of a [[Sage]] and [[Uncle Fury]], she is the half-sister of [[Akura Fury]] and possesses the power of an [[Overlady]], which she demonstrated through a technique capable of uprooting soil and grass. During the unfolding crisis, Mercy moved to protect [[Yerin]] and later traveled between clans to assist with evacuations. After being lost for a time, she eventually flew in unharmed on her staff and buried a scripted tool in the ground. Following her emergence from a spatial crack, she herded a crowd of [[Irons]] to the south and instructed the [[sacred artists]] to follow [[Jai Chen]]'s leadership so she could return to [[Sacred Valley]] once time unfroze.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] asked not to be disturbed while caring for her brother.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is present with [[Charity]] and [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is associated with the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is the daughter of [[Uncle Fury]] and a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is the half-sister of [[Akura Fury]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is a member of a family that [[Lindon]] questions her about.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] has the power of an [[Overlady]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] uses a technique that can uproot grass and soil.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] was staring at [[Samara's ring]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is a character who exclaims they will take care of [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] moved to cover [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]]'s clan provided power to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] was sitting with [[Yerin]] and [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is visiting other clans in person to assist with the evacuation.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] uses a communication construct.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is too far away to escape in time.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is unsure of [[Mercy]]'s status.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] flew in unharmed while bobbing on her staff.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] buried an object in the ground.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The object [[Mercy]] buried felt like a scripted tool.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is a person [[Ziel]] could potentially reach to escape.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] laid a hand on [[Lindon]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] provided an endorsement for [[Lindon]]'s family in [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] possesses a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|In some possible futures, [[Lindon]] marries [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] tosses [[Lindon]] a scripted stone.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] stumbled out of a spatial crack.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] herded a crowd of [[Irons]] to the south.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] intends to put [[Jai Chen]] in charge and return to [[Sacred Valley]] when time unfroze.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] wears armor that was shattered by the [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20">''Bloodline'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] told the [[sacred artists]] to listen to [[Jai Chen]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|While recovering from significant spiritual injuries caused by the [[Wandering Titan]] shattering her [[bloodline armor]], Mercy underwent an unstable advancement that tied her consciousness to the fifth page of her Book of Eternal Night. During this process, she forged a bow named [[Suu]] and arrows from [[Strings of Shadow]], becoming a peak [[Underlady]] acclimated to [[Overlord-level madra]] and [[soulfire]]. While exploring a [[labyrinth]] in the northwest, she urged her group to move quickly and utilized amethyst bolts alongside [[soulfire]]-enhanced [[Strings of Shadow]] to focus attacks on [[Reigan Shen]]. Following a period of intense combat where she used a green-and-black barrier and eventually fell, she was contained within a cocoon of [[Strings of Shadow]] while [[Lindon]] and his companions sought to help her advance. After escaping [[Orthos]], Mercy eventually went missing from the group and was later found trembling at the feet of [[Malice]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] is recovering.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] suffered significant spiritual injuries after the [[Wandering Titan]] shattered her [[bloodline armor]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]]'s madra channels are connected to her Book of Eternal Night in a unique way.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] forged her own bow and arrows out of [[Strings of Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]]'s advancement was unstable.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]]'s consciousness was tied to the fifth page of her Book during her unstable advancement.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy's mother]] is a decree-maker for the [[Akura clan territory]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]]'s [[Aunt Charity]] is a [[Heart Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] will return to her mother when called.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] is in the northwest.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] stated they do not have time.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] is part of the group exploring the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] urged the group to move.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] used [[Strings of Shadow]] to pull herself up.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] is concerned about the speed of their progress.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] released a barrage of arrows.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] looked like a rat that had been partially drowned in mud.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] made a green-and-black barrier with [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] orders [[Mercy]] to use the [[Dream of Darkness]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] has once felt like an [[Overlady]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] uses amethyst bolts.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] uses [[soulfire]]-enhanced [[Strings of Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] focused attacks on [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] called up her [[bloodline armor]] as she fell.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] was using a healing construct on her neck.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] is contained inside a cocoon of [[Strings of Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] and his companions want to help [[Mercy]] advance.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] picked up [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy's madra]] reserves were low and her channels were strained from the destruction of her [[bloodline armor]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] is a peak [[Underlady]] who is acclimated to [[Overlord-level madra]] and [[soulfire]] due to her Book.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] cycled in the hallway.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] owns the bow [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] uses armor to cover her limbs.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] escaped for the same reason [[Lindon]] was forced to leave [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] was holding [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] went missing from the group.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] was trembling at [[Malice]]'s feet.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|While stationed in a tower in [[Moongrave]], [[Akura Mercy]] assisted [[Lindon]] with his [[Overlord revelation]]. As a representative of her family who possesses a Book, she accessed restricted [[library]] records and holds knowledge regarding the location of certain plans. Despite her mother forbidding her from joining [[Lindon]] and [[Dross]], Mercy remains a kind individual who utilizes amethyst armor and black webs. During the [[Silent King]]'s attack, she was one of six beings threatened and sent an image-based message while waiting in a short tower. Although she has previously pushed her [[bloodline armor]] to its limits fighting the [[Wandering Titan]], she now faces a new crisis as [[Malice]] attempts to transport her away.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] is currently in [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] helped [[Lindon]] with her [[Overlord revelation]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] possesses a Book.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] is one of the six beings threatened by the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Dreadgod]] mentioned [[Mercy]] by name.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] was forbidden by her mother to join [[Lindon]] and [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] has fought the [[Wandering Titan]] before.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] pushed her [[bloodline armor]] to the limit during her fight with the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] is a representative of her family.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Mercy]] is an [[Akura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] has an office at the top of a tower.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] knows where the plans are.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] accessed restricted records in the [[library]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]]'s [[Path]] is something she walks one step at a time.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] informed [[Lindon]] that [[Moongrave]]'s defense has multiple layers.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] was waiting in a short tower.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] looked up to [[Lindon]] in concern.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] uses amethyst armor and black webs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] mentioned [[Mercy]] is nice to everybody.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] is a character who was stationed in a tower during the [[Silent King]]'s attack.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] sent a message that appeared as an image.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]]'s family received messages from [[Everwood]] through every channel.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] is not an [[Archlady]], [[Herald]], or [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] picked [[Mercy]] up.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] is attempting to transport [[Mercy]] away.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After emerging from the tunnels with severe structural damage to her madra channels, Mercy began training within the pages of the Book of Eternal Night. The archer eventually achieved advancement to [[Archlord]], a breakthrough facilitated by her mother's authority and a body thrice reforged in [[soulfire]]. During a chaotic battle involving lightning-dragons, she wielded the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] before being pulled from [[Akura Malice]]'s shadow by [[Lindon]]. Having absorbed her mother's power, Mercy successfully advanced to become a [[Herald]], manifesting hair made of living shadow and the ability to fire black star arrows. Following her transformation into a living [[sacred artist]], she reunited with [[Lindon]] and utilized restoration abilities.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] has severe structural damage to her madra channels.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy's mother]] was fought by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s connection to the Book of Eternal Night improved after forcing open its seventh page.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] has a training room.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is emerging from the tunnels.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] trained in the fifth page of the Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] threw a pebble at [[Lindon]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is concerned that [[Mercy]] may only be following him because he and [[Yerin]] want her to.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is an archer.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is approaching the peak of [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] fought her mother.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] and [[Lindon]] project their minds and spirits into the pages of the Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] treated [[Mercy]] poorly.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] will be pleased.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] has a shadow cycling room.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] has set herself up in a corner of the [[island]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is a character who drinks elixir through a straw.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] was on the verge of a breakthrough to [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy's mother]] left some of her authority in [[Mercy]]'s Book.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] sat in the center of a six-sided room with black-tinged mirror walls.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is a newly advanced [[Archlady]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s [[Overlord revelation]] is to bring light.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] has a body thrice reforged in [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] has advanced to [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] can be shrouded in armor.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] called out in agreement.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is an [[Archlady]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] uses a [[Shadestep]] technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] uses [[Puppeteer Iron Body]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] possesses [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] uses wind [[aura]] and [[Strings of Shadow]] to propel herself.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is a student of [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] leans on [[Suu]] in its staff form.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] had left [[Lindon]]'s group a week prior.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is tapped out.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] possesses the authority of the [[Ashwind]] queen’s heir.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy's mother]] was a [[Sage]] for many years before advancing.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] consumes a recovery elixir.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is on her way to the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is battling through a hostile storm and lightning-dragons.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] used a technique to fade into the shadows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] wore amethyst armor.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] used [[Strings of Shadow]] to try and lash herself to the ground.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] follows [[Ziel]] as he launches toward the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] holds the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is someone [[Ziel]] was protecting from the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]]'s shadows crept up to [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s body slid inside [[Akura Malice]]'s shadow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] sat [[Mercy]] onto the ground after pulling her from [[Malice]]'s shadow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] suffered a cut to the side of her eye from flying debris.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s [[soulfire]] was depleted.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] was unconscious and wrestling mentally and spiritually.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow of the Silent King]] was made for [[Mercy]] to grow into.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] sat with haunted shadows behind her eyes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is working on the Book of Eternal Night a few floors down.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s [[Archlord revelation]] was 'To bring light.'<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] instructed [[Dross]] to contact [[Yerin]] and [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] has absorbed enough of her mother's power to be stronger than she should be.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s body, spirit, and mind are suited for advancement due to her Book.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Breaking down the pages of her Book can get [[Mercy]] to [[Herald]] if she can digest it.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is preparing to advance to [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] has hair that floats like a gas or as if drifting through water.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s hair consists of wisps of living shadow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s [[bloodline armor]] blocked [[Malice]]'s first attack.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] caught [[Malice]]'s blade in one gauntlet.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] struggled to defeat a shadow [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] launches an arrow at [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is a living [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] remembers [[Malice]] punishing her in front of the entire clan.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is a character found by Emriss.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] has been using a bow since she was half a foot tall.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is hung up on her mother's death.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is mentioned in comparison to [[Ziel]]'s advancement smoothness.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is the size of a tower.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] uses a black-and-white striped bow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] has a white halo and a violet flower blooming over her head.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s arrow is a black star that falls from the sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s arrows carry heavy shadows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] asked if they should go into the portal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] asks if [[Eithan]]'s wink means he has good news.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is a character who sits in the giant's castle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] annihilated the [[Soldier]] using shadow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] reunited with [[Lindon]] upon his arrival.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] is able to use a restoration ability.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|As a member of the [[Reaper Division]], Mercy is an [[Archlord]] who possesses a [[Remnant]] and can hear the song of her [[Icon]]. The half-sister of [[Akura Fury]], she wears black armor and utilizes a bow known as [[Shattersight]], though her powers remain independent of the [[Way]]. Her abilities allow her to manifest a purple crystalline fist through [[bloodline armor]] and use [[Strings of Shadow]] to weave a web the size of a city. During her travels through the Void, she became covered in greenish blood from a split worm and retrieved a mountain containing veins of living metals. After providing [[Pride]] with a metal communication device, she insisted that the newborn world be given a name.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] is the half-sister of [[Akura Fury]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] is a member of the [[Reaper Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] wears black armor.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] can unleash [[bloodline armor]] that manifests as a purple crystalline fist.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy's mother]] designed a [[Path]] that was the ultimate expression of [[Akura Malice]]'s will.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] uses a bow called [[Shattersight]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] is a member of the [[Reaper Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] has ascended to the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] is a [[Reaper]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] uses [[Shattersight]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] can use [[Strings of Shadow]] to create a city-sized web.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] is an [[Archlord]] who possesses a [[Remnant]] and can hear the song of her [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]]'s powers are not dependent on the presence of the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] is part of the [[Reaper Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] gave [[Pride]] a metal communication device.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] was covered in greenish blood from a split worm in the Void.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] brought a mountain filled with veins of living metals.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] insisted that the newborn world must be named.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|"Is there anything we can do for her?" Mercy asked, sounding worried.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“Let’s say you do make a my mother’s level,” she said<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“That’s it!” Mercy cried, pointing to the projection.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“You did the right thing,” Mercy agreed.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Apologies, Mercy, but doesn’t your family need you?<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
